title: Implement Citation Linking System
content: ## Problem Citations are just numbers [1][2][3] that don't link to anything. Readers can't verify claims or explore sources. ## Current State - References listed at bottom but no hyperlinks - No connection between [1] in text and reference #1 - Research summaries exist in /research/studies/ but not linked ## Solution Requirements ### 1. Link Citations to References Make [1] clickable and jump to reference section: ```markdown Honey reduces cough frequency [1](#ref-1) ... ## References [1] Paul IM, et al. Cochrane Database... ``` ### 2. Link References to Summaries Each reference should link to detailed summary if available: ```markdown [1] Paul IM, et al. Cochrane Database... [Full Summary](/research/studies/honey_cochrane_2018) ``` ### 3. Consider Hover Cards Optional: Show citation preview on hover without leaving page - Title, authors, year - Key finding - Link to full summary ## Implementation Options ### Option A: Markdown Preprocessing - Script to transform [1] → [1](#ref-1) during build - Add anchors to reference section - Works with static site ### Option B: Astro Component ```astro ``` Renders as linked number with hover preview ### Option C: Client-side JavaScript - Parse citations after page load - Add links and hover behavior - More flexible but requires JS ## Deliverables 1. Working citation links in content pages 2. References link to research summaries 3. Optional: Hover preview cards 4. Build process integration ## Test Case In tickly-cough.md: - Click [1] → jumps to Cochrane reference - Click "Full Summary" → opens /research/studies/honey_cochrane_2018 - Hover [1] → shows popup with study details
